title: CI broken:   failed to initialize journal: write unixgram
body:
Seems to be consistently broken, not a flake:
```
  podman play kube --log-opt = tag test
...
# podman [options] play kube /tmp/podman_test803097333/kube.yaml --log-driver journald --log-opt tag={{.ImageName}}
         Trying to pull quay.io/libpod/alpine:latest...
         Getting image source signatures
         Copying blob sha256:9d16cba9fb961d1aafec9542f2bf7cb64acfc55245f9e4eb5abecd4cdc38d749
         Copying config sha256:961769676411f082461f9ef46626dd7a2d1e2b2a38e6a44364bcbecf51e66dd4
         Writing manifest to image destination
         Storing signatures
         Error: /tmp/podman_test803097333/kube.yaml: failed to initialize journal: write unixgram @018ee->/run/systemd/journal/socket: sendmsg: no such file or directory
```
https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/4611307990155264/html/int-podman-fedora-35-root-container.log.html#t--podman-play-kube-log-opt-tag-test--1

comments.body: The test is broken, journald must be skipped in a container.
